% Auto-generated source-truth intake stub for ID5843.
\tzpentry{ID5843}{Dipole Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5843 introduces Dipole Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \mathbf{A}_{dipole} &= \frac{\mu_0}{4\pi} \frac{\boldsymbol{\mu}_{eff}(t) \times (\mathbf{r} - \mathbf{r}_{cm}(t))}{|\mathbf{r} - \mathbf{r}_{cm}(t)|^3} \\ \mathbf{A}_{gyro} &= \frac{\mu_0}{4\pi} \int_{V_{gyro}} \frac{\mathbf{J}_{gyro}(\mathbf{r}',t) \times (\mathbf{r} - \mathbf{r}')}{|\mathbf{r} - \mathbf{r}'|^3} d^3r' \\ \mathbf{A}_{induced} &= -\frac{1}{4\pi c^2} \int_V \frac{\partial\mathbf{J}/\partial t \times (\mathbf{r} - \mathbf{r}')}{|\mathbf{r} - \mathbf{r}'|} d^3r' \end{align}
